rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH S NEW VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR THE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 3, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTs U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff lacks standing to bring this complaint and this complaint is barred by res judicata. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUL D DORN SR ET AL VS. QUICK LOAN FUNDING, A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 3, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 744 UNION PARTNERS, LLC VS. 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 3, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT 744 UNION INVESTORS AND PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. See Exs. D "Tentative Ruling on Motion to Dismiss" and E "Order Granting in Part Motion to Dismiss Case" to RJN. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ADELA MONTEMAYOR ET AL VS. GLORIA ARCENIO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 3, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANTS GLORIA ARCENIO, GREGORY ARCENIO, JUDITH ARCENIO AND RUFO ARCENIOS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged; UCL cause of action and remedies available under this cause of action are properly alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ADELA MONTEMAYOR ET AL VS. GLORIA ARCENIO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 3, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANTS GLORIA ARCENIO, GREGORY ARCENIO, JUDITH ARCENIO AND RUFO ARCENIOS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Causes of action for UCL violation, Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress and Fraud are sufficiently alleged and are not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARATOGA FUND, I, LLC VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 3, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT DAMIEN QUINN AND MARY GALVIN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant's request for judicial notice is DENIED. Complaint is no uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 3, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed January 30, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AVA NINTH, L.P., A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. DERRICK TYLER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 3, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANTS DERRICK TYLER AND REBECCA TYLERS' Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden. Proof of Service by registered process server on file. = (501/REQ)
